compiled_state.title: GREEN: Wire check-shim-refs.sh into validate.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: Add run_check shim-refs and report_check shim-refs to validate.sh following check-skill-refs.sh pattern.

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis GAP-1): validate.sh has 4 integration points per check: (1) LAUNCHED_CHECKS string (~line 827), (2) run_check call, (3) report_check in non-verbose mode, (4) tally_check in verbose mode. All 4 must be updated for shim-refs.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — 4 integration points identified in validate.sh: (1) LAUNCHED_CHECKS string line ~827, (2) run_check call line ~847, (3) report_check in non-verbose mode line ~979, (4) tally_check in verbose mode line ~988. check-shim-refs.sh does not yet exist.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (RED test pre-existing) ✓ — test file tests/scripts/test-validate-shim-refs-integration.sh already exists with 2 RED tests: test_validate_references_check_shim_refs (static check for check-shim-refs string) and test_validate_shim_refs_absent_no_crash (no exit 127).
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — All 4 integration points updated in validate.sh: (1) LAUNCHED_CHECKS conditionally adds shim-refs when script exists, (2) run_check for shim-refs guarded by file existence, (3) report_check for shim-refs guarded by file existence, (4) tally_check for shim-refs guarded by file existence.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Tests GREEN ✓ — bash tests/scripts/test-validate-shim-refs-integration.sh: PASSED: 2  FAILED: 0. test_validate_references_check_shim_refs PASS, test_validate_shim_refs_absent_no_crash PASS.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All 4 integration points in validate.sh updated per AC amendment (GAP-1). All checks guarded by script existence to prevent crash when check-shim-refs.sh is absent. Both RED tests now GREEN.
comments.author: Test
